# GLKit Constants | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ GLKit ](/documentation/glkit)

-  GLKit Constants 

API Collection# GLKit Constants

## [Topics](/documentation/glkit/glkit-constants#topics)

### [Constants](/documentation/glkit/glkit-constants#Constants)

[`let GLKTextureLoaderApplyPremultiplication: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloaderapplypremultiplication)Whether image data should be premultiplied before being loaded into the sharegroup.[`let GLKTextureLoaderErrorDomain: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadererrordomain)The error domain used by GLKit when returning texture loading errors.Deprecated[`let GLKTextureLoaderErrorKey: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadererrorkey)A key used to retrieve an error string from an error object userinfo dictionary.Deprecated[`let GLKTextureLoaderGLErrorKey: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloaderglerrorkey)A key used to retrieve additional information from an error object’s userinfo dictionary.Deprecated[`let GLKTextureLoaderGenerateMipmaps: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadergeneratemipmaps)Whether or not to create mipmaps for a texture.[`let GLKTextureLoaderGrayscaleAsAlpha: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadergrayscaleasalpha)Whether or not to treat greyscale image data as alpha information.[`let GLKTextureLoaderOriginBottomLeft: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloaderoriginbottomleft)Whether or not to vertically flip image data to match OpenGL’s coordinate system.[`let GLKTextureLoaderSRGB: String`](/documentation/glkit/glktextureloadersrgb)Whether or not to treat texture image data as sRGB data.Deprecated[`var GLK_SSE3_INTRINSICS: Int32`](/documentation/glkit/glk_sse3_intrinsics)[`let kGLKModelErrorDomain: String`](/documentation/glkit/kglkmodelerrordomain)Deprecated[`let kGLKModelErrorKey: String`](/documentation/glkit/kglkmodelerrorkey)Deprecated## [See Also](/documentation/glkit/glkit-constants#see-also)
